mapper.select: SELECT comment_idx, comment_file_idx, real_file_name, file_name, file_ext_name, file_size FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT_FILE WHERE comment_idx = #{comment_idx} ORDER BY add_date ASC
SELECT comment_idx, comment_file_idx, real_file_name, file_name, file_ext_name, file_size FROM CMS_BOARD_COMMENT_FILE WHERE comment_idx = #{comment_idx} AND comment_file_idx = #{comment_file_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CMS_BOARD_COMMENT_FILE_IDX_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CMS_BOARD_COMMENT_FILE ( comment_idx, comment_file_idx, real_file_name, file_name, file_ext_name, file_size, add_date ) VALUES ( #{comment_idx}, #{comment_file_idx}, #{real_file_name}, #{file_name}, #{file_ext_name}, #{file_size}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD_COMMENT_FILE SET file_down_count = file_down_count + 1 WHERE comment_file_idx = #{comment_file_idx}
